name: playwright-dev
tagline: Index of contributor guides for developing Playwright itself: APIs, MCP tools, CLI commands, vendor deps.
verdict: Short, clean router into detailed contributor docs; no security issues in the visible content. Lacks NOT-for scoping given how many topics it spans, and carries no version field or changelog, so consumers can't tell if it changed since they last trusted it.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' exclusions given breadth of topics (APIs, MCP tools, CLI, vendor deps, webview, bisecting).
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the frontmatter or body.
